---
name: 🖥 Add New OS Support
about: Request support for a new operating system or Linux distro
title: "[OS Request] Add support for <OS_NAME>"
labels: ["new-os", "help wanted"]
assignees: ''
---

## 🖥 Operating System / Distro
<!-- e.g. "Fedora 39", "Arch Linux", "Alpine Linux", "openSUSE" -->


## 🔍 How to detect it
<!-- What does /etc/os-release look like on this OS? -->
<!-- Paste the output of: cat /etc/os-release -->
```
ID=...
VERSION_ID=...
```

## 📦 Package Manager
<!-- e.g. dnf, pacman, zypper, apk -->


## 🔗 Are most tools available via this package manager?
<!-- List any tools from config/tools.json that might need special install steps -->


## ✅ Are you willing to contribute this yourself?
- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR
- [ ] No, I'd like someone else to implement it
